hotel_name: Thu Trang Homestay Cu Lao Cham

reviews.title: Simple nice staying in Cham
reviews.text: We got a room on the top floor with a balcony with ocean view. Everything was very simple but good enough. Walking distance to the pier and local restaurants. The host is very kind.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location. Has nice terrace, with seaview. Comfy beds. Its basic room but we liked it. Owners are really nice. For this price I recommend it, we stayed 3 nights and everything was great.

reviews.title: Rest on Cham island
reviews.text: An extremely reasonable stay at a clean and friendly homestay. My host was very welcoming and invited me to eat lunch with her family.  The view for the room was spectacular.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: The cost performance is very high, and the service is great.
reviews.text: When I was still confused at the dock, the landlady picked me up from the fast boat that left at 8 AM (I'm curious how she recognized me at a glance, haha). Although the room was small and average, it indeed had a sea view, and the price was not expensive. I also enjoyed early check-in and late check-out. The landlady was particularly warm and friendly, I recommend staying here.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
J'ai très bien dormi. 
La chambre est petite donc si vous avez de grosses valises ce n'est pas le logement idéal pour vous, mais en sac à dos c'est parfait. 
La vue sur la mer depuis le lit est incroyable. 
La chambre est propre et il y a le nécessaire d'hygiène dans la salle de bain.

reviews.title: Everything I needed!
reviews.text: This place is simple and just what I needed for a two night stay! It’s a little tough to find but the neighbors are helpful to point you in the right direction. The room was clean, the ac worked well, the shower got very hot, the bed is comfy, and the room had a view of the ocean! The host was very nice and had a motorbike available to rent, which worked really well. The WiFi was a little spotty. I recommend this place if you just need somewhere to sleep and plan to spend most of your day out exploring the island.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Très bon séjour
reviews.positives: Très bon emplacement proche du quai d'embarquement, chambre propre, vue sur mer, petite terrasse commune, au calme. Famille très sympa.
reviews.negatives: Rien. Le minimum y est, très bien pour un petit séjour sur l'île. Dommage, les propriétaires ne parlent pas anglais,  ce qui limite les échanges.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Je vous conseille cet établissement 
Cette dame est formidable est très accueillante 
En louant ici on vous proposera la traversée en bateau depuis  Hội An et vous pourrez louer des scooters sur place à des prix très raisonnable.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Super cadre face à la mer. Gentillesse des hôtes.
4 Tage in Cham Islands
reviews.text:
Die Unterkunft ist sehr attraktiv und sauber und ganz zentral zu der Uferpromenade mit vielen wunderschönen Restaurants. 
Kommen Sie hierher und entspannen Sie sich für einige Tage 
Markus Russi,  Zürich Ende Mai 2026
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Accueil chaleureux de la famille, aux petits soins. Vue sur le port, très jolie et calme.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Хорошее расположение в центре, рядом с кафешками. Хозяйка не говорит по-английски, но во всём старается помочь. Хороший вид с балкона. Вход через переулок.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.title: Wir würden wieder buchen!
reviews.positives:
Die Lage war klasse, wir konnten zudem einen Roller mieten. Allerdings hätten wir diesen gar nicht unbedingt gebraucht, da die Insel so klein ist. Zum Sunset Point und den entsprechenden Strand war er aber super. Schnorchel Sachen konnte man auch ausleihen (Zustand ok. Ein Set war eher unbrauchbar leider, Schnorchel und Maske waren undicht).
Restaurants direkt fussläufig erreichbar. Nahe zu den Piers für speedboot und auch Fähre. 
Die Eigentümerin hat uns zum Glück einen Tag vor der Anreise informiert dass am nächsten Tag die Fähren ab 9 Uhr ausfallen werden (wir hatten nicht bei ihr gebucht) und so konnten wir noch reagieren und die Zeit anpassen. Sie bietet auch an, dass man über die Bucht. Sie hat zudem abgeklärt von welchem Pier aus wir zurück fahren werden und uns auch dorthin begleitet früh morgens. Das war klasse.

Es gibt beim 4 Bettzimmer zudem einen großen Balkon den man mitbenutzen kann. Das ist sehr schön.
reviews.negatives:
Wie angesprochen die schnorchelsets waren nicht optimal und auch Wäsche würde ich nicht nochmal dort waschen lassen. Da bei dem herrschenden Wind, die Wäsche im Freien aufgehängt wurde, dadurch sind aber bereits nachts Teile weggeflogen und auch teilweise beschäftigt worden, da zu fest am Metall Kleiderbügel eingeklemmt, habe ich nun Löcher/streifen in manchen Kleidungsstücken. Mein Wäschesack wurde zudem ungefragt weggeschmissen, hat mich wahnsinnig geärgert, da ich diesen natürlich weiterverwenden wollte und extra überall darauf hingewiesen wird, auf der Insel möglichst wenig Müll zu produzieren.

Das eigene Bad, ist ggf. nicht wirklich eigen. Beim 4 Bettzimmer befindet sich dieses auf dem Gang und jeder kann es betreten/nutzen. Wir haben auch mehrfach die Türe offen vorgefunden, was darauf schließen lässt, dass jemand es benutzt hat. Das Waschbecken läuft direkt auf den Boden ab, so hat man auch beim Händewaschen teilweise nasse Füße. Etwas unangenehm.

reviews.title: Beach vibe…no expectation no worries.
reviews.positives: De ligging is heel prettig, rustig steegje direct aan de boulevard. Kamer met leuk uitzicht.
reviews.negatives:
Hygiëne, veiligheid, badkamer schoonheid netheid.
Rommelig, aftands maar wel functioneel.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời và đáng nhớ.
reviews.positives: Mình ở 2 phòng view biển, mình cực kì thích view này luôn, mê lắmmm. Giá cả hợp lý, phòng sạch sẽ, có đủ điều hoà, máy nóng lạnh. Cô chú chủ nhà và con gái cô chú siêu nhiệt tình luôn, home gần cảng, rất tiện di chuyển luôn. Nếu muốn thuê xe, mn có thể nhờ cô chú thuê giúp, giá cả cũng hợp lý ạ. Rất recommend cho mn ạ. Nếu có thể, mong home bố trí thêm thùng rác bên ngoài, vì nhà vệ sinh hơi nhỏ, nếu bỏ rác vào thùng rác trong nhà vệ sinh thì sử dụng vòi sen dễ làm ướt rác gây bất tiện ạ.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Cô chủ thân thiện, nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives: Thời tiết thay đổi thất thường

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Персонал, помогли с байком и медицинской помощью
reviews.negatives: Некуда положить вещи в комнате, крючки для одежды сломаны, тумбочки нет

reviews.title: Avoid at all costs!
reviews.positives: The only thing that was good was the location and the hosts of the homestay were friendly
reviews.negatives:
The bathroom in one room had a working electrical light socket right next to the shower.  The air conditioning didn’t work either in the other room, which made for a very sweaty night.
We expected a very basic set up considering the price of the accommodation, but there is no excuse for offering something that is a potential death trap.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Family working there (owners I guess) were very nice and kind, responsive and helped with everything!
reviews.negatives:
The room was dirty and full of ants. The bathroom didn’t have a proper door that could be closed, it kept opening by itself. What I really don’t like is lazy service; no one even checked the room before a new guest arrived. There was trash left behind from previous guests. It would only take a few minutes to clean a small room.

From the toilet, I could see the neighbors upstairs, and we could hear them all the time—even their quiet voices—because there is a hole. Overall toilet was disgusting and we didnt really use it (of course there is no hot water or pressure). It would cost very little and take only a few minutes to completely change my experience at your place.

I hope you take my review as constructive feedback and put a little more effort into it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Really good location, the room is really good

reviews.title: Relaxing, great value and friendly host
reviews.positives: Great location a 2 minute walk from the boat. Great communication from the host and great value for money.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
There was nothing bad about the property. 
The bed and pillows were comfy, but the room and bathroom were tiny. You could hear next door. 
The owner was lovely. Great view from bed looking out on the ocean. 
Great location close to.all bars and restaurants
reviews.negatives: The size of the room, tiny bathroom.and that you could hear next door

reviews.title: The owner is very cool and kind! We would like to come next year here again.
